Package com.erp.hrms.Repository

Interface AttendanceRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Attendance,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Attendance,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Attendance,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Attendance,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Attendance,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Attendance>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Attendance,Long>
public interface AttendanceRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Attendance,Long>

  • Method Details

    • search

      @Query("SELECT a FROM Attendance a JOIN FETCH a.user u WHERE (:name IS NULL OR u.name LIKE %:name%) AND (:workDate IS NULL OR a.work_date = :workDate)") List<Attendance> search(@Param("name") String name, @Param("workDate") LocalDate workDate)

    • getPersonAttendance

      @Query(value="SELECT\n COUNT(*) as workDays,\n SUM(CASE WHEN late_minutes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateCount,\n SUM(late_minutes) as lateMinutes,\n SUM(overtime_minutes) as overtimeMinutes\nFROM attendance a\nJOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id\nWHERE u.name = :name\nAND a.work_date BETWEEN :dateFrm AND :dateTo\n", nativeQuery=true) AttendanceSummaryDTO getPersonAttendance(String name, String dateFrm, String dateTo)

    • getDeptAttendance

      @Query(value="SELECT\n COUNT(*) as workDays,\n SUM(CASE WHEN late_minutes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateCount,\n COALESCE(SUM(late_minutes),0) as lateMinutes,\n COALESCE(SUM(overtime_minutes),0) as overtimeMinutes,\n AVG(overtime_minutes) as avgOvertime,\n ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN late_minutes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100.0, 2) as lateRate\nFROM attendance a\nJOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id\nWHERE u.dept_id = :deptId\nAND a.work_date BETWEEN :dateFrm AND :dateTo\n", nativeQuery=true) AttendanceSummaryDTO getDeptAttendance(@Param("deptId") String deptId, @Param("dateFrm") String dateFrm, @Param("dateTo") String dateTo)

    • getAbAttendance

      @Query(value="SELECT\n u.name as name,\n COUNT(*) as lateCount,\n SUM(late_minutes) as lateMinutes,\n ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (\n SELECT COUNT(*) \n FROM attendance a2 \n WHERE a2.user_id = a.user_id\n AND a2.work_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)\n ),1) as lateRate\nFROM attendance a\nJOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id\nWHERE late_minutes > 0\nAND a.work_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)\nGROUP BY u.name, a.user_id\nORDER BY lateCount DESC\nLIMIT 5\n", nativeQuery=true) List<AttendanceSummaryDTO> getAbAttendance()

    • countAttendToday

      @Query(" SELECT COUNT(a)\n FROM Attendance a\n WHERE a.work_date = :today\n AND a.attendance_status IN (\'\uc815\uc0c1\',\'\uc9c0\uac01\',\'\uc870\ud1f4\',\'\uc9c0\uac01+\uc870\ud1f4\')\n") Long countAttendToday(@Param("today") LocalDate today)

    • countLateToday

      @Query(" SELECT COUNT(a)\n FROM Attendance a\n WHERE a.work_date = :today\n AND a.attendance_status IN (\'\uc9c0\uac01\',\'\uc9c0\uac01+\uc870\ud1f4\')\n") Long countLateToday(@Param("today") LocalDate today)

    • countAbsentToday

      @Query(" SELECT COUNT(u)\n FROM User u\n WHERE u.role = \'ROLE_USER\'\n AND u.id NOT IN (\n SELECT a.user.id\n FROM Attendance a\n WHERE a.work_date = :today\n )\n") Long countAbsentToday(@Param("today") LocalDate today)

    • monthlyAttendance

      @Query(" SELECT MONTH(a.work_date), COUNT(a)\n FROM Attendance a\n WHERE YEAR(a.work_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)\n GROUP BY MONTH(a.work_date)\n ORDER BY MONTH(a.work_date)\n") List<Object[]> monthlyAttendance()

    • deptLateRate

      @Query(" SELECT d.deptName,\n SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status LIKE \'%\uc9c0\uac01%\' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(a)\n FROM Attendance a\n JOIN a.user u\n JOIN u.dept d\n GROUP BY d.deptName\n ORDER BY 2 DESC\n") List<Object[]> deptLateRate()
